---

Little will need to be done to garner employee buy-in for storytelling, simply
because storytelling has universal appeal.
The work that we do to improve your business can also be used in your employees'
personal life, too.
When employees see this link between professional and personal growth, their
willing engagement in storytelling increases exponentially.
